response_text:
ENTITY Client
PK client_id
ATTR client_id : integer : PK
ATTR client_name : varchar

ENTITY Order
PK order_id
ATTR order_id : integer : PK
ATTR client_id : integer : FK
ATTR date : date

ENTITY Material
PK material_id
ATTR material_id : integer : PK
ATTR description : varchar

ENTITY Operation
PK operation_id
ATTR operation_id : integer : PK
ATTR description : varchar

ENTITY WorkCenter
PK workcenter_id
ATTR workcenter_id : integer : PK

ENTITY OrderOperation
PK order_operation_id
ATTR order_operation_id : integer : PK
ATTR order_id : integer : FK
ATTR material_id : integer : FK
ATTR operation_id : integer : FK
ATTR workcenter_id : integer : FK
ATTR timestamp : timestamp
ATTR quantity : float

REL OrderOperation -> Client : 1 -> 0..N : FK=client_id
REL OrderOperation -> Order : 1 -> 1..N : FK=order_id
REL OrderOperation -> Material : 1 -> 1..N : FK=material_id
REL OrderOperation -> Operation : 1 -> 1..N : FK=operation_id
REL OrderOperation -> WorkCenter : 1 -> 1..N : FK=workcenter_id
